'''zapama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coaching|coaching]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coaching|coaching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zapama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæpæmæth|zæpæmæth]] || [[word:zæpæmæj|zæpæmæj]] || [[word:zæpæmæsh|zæpæmæsh]] || [[word:zæpæmæ|zæpæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zapapamath|zapapamath]] || [[word:zapapamaj|zapapamaj]] || [[word:zapapamash|zapapamash]] || [[word:zapapama|zapapama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zapamath|zapamath]] || [[word:zapamaj|zapamaj]] || [[word:zapamash|zapamash]] || [[word:zapama|zapama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zapafmath|zapafmath]] || [[word:zapafmaj|zapafmaj]] || [[word:zapafmash|zapafmash]] || [[word:zapafmaf|zapafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zapamatha|zapamatha]] || [[word:zapamaja|zapamaja]] || [[word:zapamasha|zapamasha]] || [[word:zapamaka|zapamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zapamath|zapamath]] || [[word:zapamaj|zapamaj]] || [[word:zapamash|zapamash]] || [[word:zapama|zapama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zapamathal|zapamathal]] || [[word:zapamajal|zapamajal]] || [[word:zapamashal|zapamashal]] || [[word:zapamakal|zapamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zapamathatha|zapamathatha]] || [[word:zapamajaja|zapamajaja]] || [[word:zapamashasha|zapamashasha]] || [[word:zapamaka|zapamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zapamathan|zapamathan]] || [[word:zapamajan|zapamajan]] || [[word:zapamashan|zapamashan]] || [[word:zapamakan|zapamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zapamathaoro|zapamathaoro]] || [[word:zapamajaoro|zapamajaoro]] || [[word:zapamashaoro|zapamashaoro]] || [[word:zapamakaoro|zapamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
